title: Weapon of God
description: It's a small mod that adds a new Sword to the Game.
body:
⚔️ What is Weapon of God?
Weapon of God is a supernatural sword that doesn’t just deal heavy damage — it unleashes an epic visual ban effect, complete with lightning strikes, particle rings, explosions that destroy blocks, and a powerful sound effect to complete the experience.

✨ Features--->
1. 🗡️ Deals 12 damage – stronger than Netherite!

2. ⛓️ "Binding" effect triggers just before a final blow

3. ⚡ Summons lightning on the target when finishing them

4. 💥 Explosion that destroys blocks (real explosion, not just visual)

5. 🌀 Particle rings (CHAIN particles) represent divine power

6. 🔊 Unique sound effect when the final hit lands

7. 🚫 Visual ban for players – not a real disconnect, but a full visual sequence

8. 🐄 Also works on any entity – useful for testing the effects

9. ✅ Compatible with Essential Mod – works perfectly in multiplayer

10. 🌈 Purple item name – styled like a Nether Star
-----------------------
🧪 How it works --->
Hold the Judgement Blade in your hand.

Hit a player or entity.

When your target is about to die:

They're frozen in place (binding effect)

A lightning strike hits them

A destructive explosion goes off

Sound and particles trigger around them

A visual "ban" effect plays
-----------------------
📦 Installation
Install Fabric Loader 1.20.1

Install the Fabric API

(Optional) Install the Essential Mod for multiplayer compatibility

Drop the mod .jar file into your mods folder

Launch Minecraft and enjoy divine power
-----------------------
🎯 Who is it for?
This mod is perfect for:

Creative players

Server admins who want an epic admin weapon

Modpack creators looking to add divine tools

Anyone who loves cool particles and effects



 

How to get it ingame:
/give (Player) weaponofgod:judgement_blade
